author: unknown
body:
Resolved design Qs (2026-04-16):
- regex compilation runs on every config load (initial + SIGHUP reload), not just startup
- assignment carries raw patterns; runner re-compiles per step (server pre-validated)
- StepSignalsData gains parallel signal_matches: Vec<SignalMatch> field (additive)
- slice order: 1 config -> 2 runner scan -> 3 workflow policy -> 4 claude.toml + manual repro
